title: fix(OMN-8723): gate golden_chain probe to GATED when consumers idle

checks.description: EnumChainStatus.GATED and EnumSweepStatus.GATED added as non-blocking values
checks.message: OK: handler_golden_chain_sweep.py adds GATED to both enums; EnumChainStatus.GATED = 'gated', EnumSweepStatus.GATED = 'gated'

checks.description: GoldenChainSweepRequest.idle_gate bool field added with default False
checks.message: OK: idle_gate: bool = False in GoldenChainSweepRequest. When True, missing projected rows produce GATED not TIMEOUT
OK: chains_gated: int = 0 in GoldenChainSweepResult; incremented for each GATED chain

checks.description: Overall status: GATED when no real failures but some gated; PARTIAL when mix of gated+fail; FAIL only for real failures
checks.message: OK: failed==0 and gated>0 → GATED; gated>0 and failed>0 → PARTIAL; failed>0 only → FAIL

checks.description: --idle-gate flag added to __main__.py; GATED exit code is 0 (non-blocking)
checks.message: OK: --idle-gate argparse flag; result.status in ('pass', 'gated') exits 0

checks.description: 8 unit tests covering all idle-gate branches in tests/test_golden_chain_sweep_idle_gate.py
checks.message: OK: 8/8 tests pass — timeout→gated, all-gated overall, pass+gated non-blocking, real fail RED, gated+fail=PARTIAL, message content, counter accuracy

checks.description: Pre-existing golden chain sweep tests all pass
checks.message: OK: 8 pre-existing tests in test_golden_chain_golden_chain_sweep.py all pass; TIMEOUT behavior unchanged when idle_gate=False

checks.description: Full test suite passes with no new regressions
checks.message: OK: 4488 passed, 3 skipped; 4 pre-existing postgres connection failures in test_datasource_postgres.py (live DB required, unrelated)
OK: All 15 hooks pass on second run (first run auto-fixed EOL normalization in evidence JSON files unrelated to this change)
